raw_description:
Welcome to JW Marriott Hotel Kuwait City.

A Landmark of Mindful Luxury in the Heart of Kuwait City.

An icon reimagined, JW Marriott Kuwait City marks a new chapter of luxury and distinction. 
The hotel’s transformation celebrates its legacy while introducing contemporary elegance through thoughtfully curated spaces designed to inspire tranquility and connection. 

Guests are welcomed by refined comfort and genuine warmth, with luxuriously appointed rooms and suites that blend sophistication and serenity through exquisite amenities and soft neutral tones. 
Culinary journeys unfold across distinctive venues, including Terrace Grill, Griffin Lounge, and JW Market, each offering crafted experiences for every taste.

Guests can rejuvenate at Spa by JW® and the Health Club or host memorable gatherings at Al Thuraya Ballroom, connected to Salhia Complex with its luxury boutiques and ample dining options. 

JW Marriott Kuwait City redefines mindful luxury in the heart of Kuwait.

Couples particularly like the location — they rated it9.5for a two-person trip.

description: Experience clinical levels of high-end luxury at JW Marriott Hotel Kuwait. Located conveniently in its prime location, this property features 10 key amenities including Indoor swimming pool, Free WiFi, Free parking.
